docs: Initialize base portfolio value after first tokens are added (owner only)
This sets the immutable baseline for performance tracking
messages.label: initialize_base_portfolio_value

docs: Calculate current index value using the formula:
Index Value = (Current Portfolio Value / Base Portfolio Value) × Base Index Value
messages.label: calculate_current_index_value

docs: Get current cached index value (fast query)
messages.label: get_current_index_value

docs: Update cached index value with real-time calculation (owner only)
messages.label: update_index_value

docs: Get index performance as basis points relative to $100 baseline
Returns: +2500 for +25%, -1500 for -15%, etc.
messages.label: get_index_performance

docs: Get real-time index performance (recalculates current value)
messages.label: get_realtime_index_performance

docs: Get index base metrics for UI display
messages.label: get_index_base_metrics

docs: Get index value in USD (converted via DOT/USD oracle)

docs: Get real-time index value in USD

docs: Check if index value data is stale (not updated recently)

docs: Get time since last index update in milliseconds

docs: Force index recalculation and update (owner only)
messages.label: refresh_index_value

docs: Get index performance over time periods (if we had historical data)
messages.label: get_index_summary

docs: Buy W3PI tokens by depositing USDC
Flow: User sends USDC → deduct 0.55% fee → swap to basket tokens → mint W3PI
messages.label: buy_w3pi

docs: Sell W3PI tokens and receive USDC
Flow: User sends W3PI → burn W3PI → swap basket tokens to USDC → deduct 0.95% fee → return USDC
messages.label: sell_w3pi

docs: Get current W3PI price in USDC
messages.label: get_w3pi_price

docs: Get quote for buying W3PI
messages.label: get_buy_quote

docs: Get quote for selling W3PI
messages.label: get_sell_quote

docs: Get user's W3PI balance
messages.label: get_user_w3pi_balance

docs: Get total W3PI supply
messages.label: get_total_w3pi_supply

docs: Receive reallocation from Staking contract (zombie stake cleanup)
This function receives USDC value from liquidated zombie stakes
and redistributes it proportionally to active holdings
messages.label: receive_reallocation
